# ErgoFlex Chair Comparison

Compare our three best-selling office chairs to find the right fit for your
workspace and budget.

## Quick comparison

| Feature           | Pro 5000          | Pro 3000      | Executive         |
| ----------------- | ----------------- | ------------- | ----------------- |
| Price             | $749              | $549          | $999              |
| Style             | High-back mesh    | Mid-back mesh | High-back leather |
| Lumbar support    | Dynamic           | Adjustable    | Fixed             |
| Armrests          | 4D                | 3D            | 2D                |
| Weight capacity   | 300 lbs           | 275 lbs       | 350 lbs           |
| Warranty (frame)  | 12 years          | 10 years      | 15 years          |
| Avg review rating | 4.6 ★             | 4.4 ★         | 4.8 ★             |
| Best for          | All-day desk work | Home office   | Executive office  |

## Which chair is right for you?

Choose the **Pro 5000** if you sit for 8+ hours a day and need maximum
adjustability. The dynamic lumbar support and 4D armrests let you fine-tune
every contact point.

Choose the **Pro 3000** if you work from home and want professional ergonomics
at a mid-range price. It sacrifices the dynamic lumbar and one armrest
dimension but keeps the same build quality.

Choose the **Executive** if appearance matters as much as comfort. The leather
upholstery and chrome base make it the best-looking chair in our lineup. The
15-year frame warranty is our longest.

## What customers say

> "I bought the Pro 3000 for my home office and it's perfect. I'm 5'8" and
> the mid-back is exactly the right height for me."
>

> "The Executive chair makes my Zoom background look 10× more professional.
> Also incredibly comfortable for 10-hour days."
>

> "Went with the Pro 5000 after trying all three at a showroom. The dynamic
> lumbar actually works — I can feel it move when I lean back."
>

## Bottom line

All three chairs exceed ANSI/BIFMA standards and ship free to the contiguous
US. The Pro 5000 is our most popular model by volume. The Executive has the
highest satisfaction rating. The Pro 3000 is the best value.
